A systematic 30-day program to explore the full spectrum of film aesthetics before committing to a niche. Structured around weekly themes: 1970s exploitation cinema, 1980s British/European television, 1990s subcultures & counter culture, and international genre cinema. Includes evaluation frameworks, resources, and decision criteria for niche selection.
